subscriptionOverhead.bankSecurityNotice: Connecting your bank lets Sylk automatically import transactions, match them to projects, and give you real-time financial insights. Your credentials are never stored — we use Teller, a bank-grade secure connection.
subscriptionOverhead.skipNote: You can also do this later in Settings
subscriptionOverhead.bankConnectionError: Failed to start bank connection. You can do this later in Settings.
subscriptionOverhead.overheadSubtitle: Track fixed costs for accurate profit calculations
subscriptionOverhead.overheadImportanceNotice: Adding your overhead costs (rent, insurance, vehicle payments, etc.) is how Sylk calculates your real profit. Without this, your profit numbers won't be accurate.
subscriptionOverhead.enterExpenseName: Enter a name for this expense
subscriptionOverhead.expenseExamples: Examples: Office rent, truck payment, insurance, tools, software subscriptions, fuel
